paper_title: The FACTS Grounding Leaderboard: Benchmarking LLMs Ability to Ground Responses to Long-Form Input
evaluation_method: Two-phase LLM-as-judge using 3 frontier judge models (Gemini 1.5 Pro, GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet). Phase 1: Eligibility (is response sufficient?). Phase 2: Grounding (is response fully grounded in document?). Binary per-example.
metric: Average of all judge models scores
